title: Resolving gel buffer (4X)
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"9i90v","text":"For use in Polyacrylamide Gel System For Electrophoresis Of Proteins.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[{"key":0,"offset":11,"length":57}],"data":[]}],"entityMap":{"0":{"type":"link","mutability":"MUTABLE","data":{"guid":"F4F5B7A23F9143D9ADB52941119E856E","url":"https://www.protocols.io/view/Polyacrylamide-Gel-System-For-Electrophoresis-Of-P-ep7bdrn"}}}}
steps: Dissolve 45.4 gm of Tris base in 200 mL of d-H 2 O.
Adjust the pH to 8.8 with concentrated HCl.
Adjust to a final volume of 250 mL.
creator: Irina Agarkova
